subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Your letter was received and perused. Praise be unto God that ye are sacrificing your lives and are among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی نامه شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید حمد خدا را که جانفشانید و از اهل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition
